response.original_title: Can I get my money back from Surfshark? -instant help-
response.overview: Yes, you can get your money back from Surfshark if you 1 (855 )) 783 7555 request a refund within their 30-day money-back guarantee window. 1 (855 )) 783 7555 To start the process, you should log in to 1 (855 )) 783 7555 your dashboard at surfshark.com and disable the auto-renewal feature 1 (855 )) 783 7555 under the "Subscription" tab to prevent further billing. However, 1 (855 )) 783 7555 simply turning off the renewal does not automatically initiate 1 (855 )) 783 7555 a refund; you must explicitly contact their billing department 1 (855 )) 783 7555 to request your funds. For immediate assistance and to 1 (855 )) 783 7555 ensure your request is authorized, you can call 1 (855 )) 783 7555 1 (855 )) 783 7555 to speak with a representative who can verify your 1 (855 )) 783 7555 eligibility and process the reversal in real-time.
